meaning: n.琥珀adj.琥珀制的,琥珀色(黄色)的
examples: Cars did not stop when the lights were on amber.
A burst of sunshine sent a beam of amber light through the window.
The traffic lights were on amber.
Amber is a film and photography collective incorporating Amber Films, Side Gallery and Side Cinema.
By including the abbey on its route, the Amber Trail Greenway is bringing these initiatives more attention.
